title: Castro Heirs Emerge Across Cuba’s Political Scene Amid Energy Crisis and Trump Threats
summary_full: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”
summary_public: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”
